926.one_line_summary: Address metadata registry for identity and authorization data
926.notes: Uses ERC-165 for interface detection; enables flexible metadata provider architecture

927.one_line_summary: Generalized authorization/permission framework via metadata providers
927.notes: Built on ERC-926; replaces protocol-specific approvals and operator patterns

998.one_line_summary: Composable non-fungible tokens that own other ERC-721 and ERC-20 tokens
998.notes: Top-down and bottom-up composable patterns; enables hierarchical ownership structures

1046.one_line_summary: Adds tokenURI metadata to ERC-20; extends ERC-721 and ERC-1155 interoperability
1046.notes: Interoperability metadata schema for differentiating token types via URI

1056.one_line_summary: Lightweight decentralized identity registry with delegates and attributes
1056.notes: DID-compliant; free identity creation via Ethereum accounts; supports key rotation

1062.one_line_summary: IPFS hash to ENS resolver mapping for decentralized content addressing
1062.notes: Bridges IPFS content addressing with ENS human-readable names

1066.one_line_summary: Standardized status codes for smart contracts analogous to HTTP codes
1066.notes: Extends contract communication beyond binary success/failure; enables automatable state transitions

1077.one_line_summary: Gas relay for contract calls via signed messages and token payments
1077.notes: Enables gas abstraction via third-party relayers; supports arbitrary token for fee payment

1078.one_line_summary: Universal login/signup using ENS and identity contracts with signed messages
1078.notes: Account model for dapps; uses device-specific keys for signing; progressive key privilege levels

1080.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension with token recovery, theft prevention, and chargeback support
1080.notes: Dispute resolution for lost/stolen tokens; lost account and stolen account procedures

1081.one_line_summary: Standard interface for issuing bounties in any ERC-20 token or ETH
1081.notes: Standardizes issuance, fulfillment, and acceptance workflows; tracks reputation across platforms

1123.one_line_summary: EthPM v2 smart contract packaging standard (withdrawn in favor of ERC-2678)
1123.notes: Superseded by ERC-2678; defines package manifest for contract distribution

1129.one_line_summary: Standardized announcements framework for dApp service status updates
1129.notes: Permissions-based posting; event tracking for service transitions and freezes

1132.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension enabling time-locking of tokens within the contract
1132.notes: Multiple reasons for locking; allows locked tokens to remain usable in ecosystem; avoids external escrow

1154.one_line_summary: Standard interface for oracle data reporting (withdrawn)
1154.notes: Push-based oracle consumer pattern; immutable results per ID; status: withdrawn
